name: Black Bean and Rice Salad (Vegan)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice, black beans, chopped tomatoes, shredded cheddar cheese (if desired), and chopped fresh parsley.
2. Pour the low-calorie Italian dressing and fresh lime juice over the rice mixture.
3. Toss everything together until well combined.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves.
